holdings.infoBox: SPYC is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares Core S&P 500 ETF stock at 92.56%, TRS SBAR SOFR +93 051427 at 22.30%, TRS SBAR SOFR +95 061527 at 13.86%, B 09/01/26 Govt at 3.15%, and B 10/15/26 Govt at 1.22%.

overview.description: The Simplify US Equity PLUS Convexity ETF (SPYC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed, fund-of-funds that provides exposure to the S&P 500 with a systematic options overlay strategy. The overlay strategy seeks to enhance upside potential and hedge downside risk. SPYC was launched on Sep 3, 2020 and is issued by Simplify.

data.title: Simplify Provides Estimated Capital Gain Distribution Information for 2025
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Simplify Asset Management announces that it expects to deliver capital gains distributions across ten ETFs.

data.title: ETF Edge, August 30, 2021
data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani talks hedging strategies and downside protection with Simplify ETFs CEO Paul Kim and ETF Trends Chief Investment Officer Dave Nadig.

data.title: How one ETF provider uses options and derivatives to hedge against downside
data.text: Simplify ETFs CEO and co-founder Paul Kim and ETF Trends Chief Investment Officer and director of research Dave Nadig discuss the rise of alternative ETF strategies with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: ETF Investing: Duty, honor, country, and wealth management: ETFs that aim to do right by veterans
data.text: Just in time for Veterans Day comes a new exchange-traded fund that includes companies with good track records of supporting veteran employees, making two such ETFs now available for investors.
